rulings.Case Title: ANDREW VERT VS. ROBERT FULLMER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 15, 2011, line 1. Defendant Robert Fullmer's demurrer to complaint. Overruled 5 days to answer. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GENE ROLAND VS. RAKESH KUKATLA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 15, 2011, line 2. Defendant Rakesh Kukatla's motion to continue jury trial and/or settlement conference. Deny. (501/REQ)
